resolution: Bug removed - targets .claude/commands/*.md files which cannot be edited per system restrictions
title: Potential Race Condition in Ingestion Command
description: The ingestion command does not handle concurrent executions properly, which could lead to race conditions when multiple ingestion processes are run simultaneously.

root_cause_potential: Lack of proper locking mechanisms in ingestion process
No queue system to manage concurrent ingestion requests
Potential data corruption from simultaneous access
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Implement locking mechanisms or use a queue system to manage concurrent ingestion requests

immediate_fixes.action: Implement file-based locking or database-level locking for ingestion processes
immediate_fixes.rationale: Prevent multiple processes from interfering with each other

immediate_fixes.action: Add queue system (Redis-based) for managing ingestion requests
immediate_fixes.rationale: Serialize ingestion operations to avoid race conditions

immediate_fixes.action: Add process ID tracking and conflict detection
immediate_fixes.rationale: Monitor and detect concurrent execution attempts

impact_assessment.user_impact: High - Data corruption or failed ingestion processes
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: High - Core ingestion functionality at risk
